_comment: Single source of truth for the sponsor wall on the website (and a mirror in README). Rendered grouped by tier (gold > silver > bronze > supporter), then by `weight` DESCENDING within a tier. `weight` is a private sort key (never displayed) — use the monthly amount or any relative number; the site never shows the figure. Tier is set explicitly here, not derived from `weight`, so you stay in control. `logo` is optional: gold/silver/bronze without a logo render as a name card; supporters render as an avatar+name chip (or text-only chip with no logo). To add a sponsor: drop one object in `sponsors[]`; download any logo into web/img/sponsors/ and reference the LOCAL path (never hotlink Facebook/CDN URLs — they expire). Later this file can be auto-generated from the GitHub Sponsors API by a scheduled GitHub Action — the schema stays the same. WARRIX is pinned first via a very high weight (main partner + sponsor).
